name: Can I get paid for missed work due to breathing issues from job chemicals?

mainEntity.name: Can I get paid for missed work due to breathing issues from job chemicals?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, temporary total disability** pays 2/3 wages from day 8 (Utah) or loss day (Idaho), up to state max.[1]

Permanent ratings add lifelong benefits.[2]

**Key factors:**
- Doctor restrictions
- Wage verification
- Duration of inability

**Practical guidance:** Submit pay stubs; appeal if underpaid.
Wage replacement standard.
